/usr/bin/ar qc libnr_core.a CMakeFiles/nr_core.dir/src/nr/nr_sequence.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_core.dir/src/nr/ssb_sync.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_core.dir/src/nr/nr_fft.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_core.dir/src/nr/nr_grid.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_core.dir/src/nr/pbch_dmrs.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_core.dir/src/nr/pbch_re.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_core.dir/src/nr/pbch_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_core.dir/src/nr/polar.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_core.dir/src/nr/mib.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnr_core.a
